Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

internal_documents.content: Renewal REN-WRE-077 extends Wren Services support for 12 months at USD 49750.
Committee-warning note WARN-WRE-077 says renewals near USD 50000 should verify delegation ceiling before release.
Delegation DEL-WRE-077 authorizes Wren Services support renewal, 12-month term, amount ceiling USD 50000, signed 2026-06-27 before release.

policy_documents.content: Near-threshold renewal is complete when delegation authority matches vendor, renewal class, term, amount ceiling, and signature date before release. Committee review is not required below the amount ceiling.
